_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: We consistently observed that PRC2 inactivation in various cancer models converted a mostly cytostatic response into robust cytotoxicity upon DNMTi therapy via caspase-dependent programmed cell death
details: PRC2 inactivation converted mostly cytostatic response into robust cytotoxicity upon DNMTi therapy via caspase-dependent programmed cell death
